subset.name: RxJurisdictionalIdentifierType
subset.description: Codes identifying the issuer of jurisdictional prescription identifiers

concept.name: New Brunswick Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: New Brunswick Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance dans le SIM de Terre-Neuve-et-Labrador [STAGING]
concept.description: Used by the New Brunswick DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely

concept.name: Nova Scotia Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: Nova Scotia Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance dans le SIM de la Nouvelle-Écosse
concept.description: Used by the Nova Scotia DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely

concept.name: Prince Edward Island Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: PEI DIS Prescription Protocol Identifier OID
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance (OID du protocole) dans le SIM de l'Î.-P.-É.
concept.description: Used by the Prince Edward Island DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely

concept.name: Newfoundland and Labrador Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: Newfoundland and Labrador Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance dans le SIM de Terre-Neuve-et-Labrador
concept.description: Used by the Newfoundland and Labrador DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely

concept.name: Newfoundland and Labrador Drug Information System Prescription Identifier [STAGING]
concept.enDisplayName: Newfoundland and Labrador Drug Information System Prescription Identifier [STAGING]
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance dans le SIM du Nouveau-Brunswick
concept.description: Used by the Newfoundland and Labrador DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely [STAGING]

concept.name: Saskatchewan Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: PIP Generated Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d'ordonnance généré par le PIP de la Saskatchewan
concept.description: Used by the Saskatchewan DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely [STAGING]

concept.name: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d’ordonnance dans le système d'information sur les médicaments de l'Alberta
concept.description: Used by the Alberta DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely

concept.name: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier [TEST]
concept.enDisplayName: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier [TEST]
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d’ordonnance dans le système d'information sur les médicaments de l'Alberta [TEST]
concept.description: Used by the Alberta DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely [TEST]

concept.name: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.enDisplayName: Alberta Drug Information System Prescription Identifier
concept.frDisplayName: Numéro d’ordonnance dans le système d'information sur les médicaments de l'Alberta
concept.description: Used by the Alberta DIS to identify prescriptions uniquely
concept.frDescription: Numéro utilisé par le SIM de l'Alberta pour identifier les ordonnances uniquement
